title: 🚨 Hotfix: Event Pooling Crash
message: Fixed a React Native SyntheticEvent pooling crash that occurred when extracting layout data during the scrollbar initialization.

title: 📜 Table Scroll & Copy Fixes
message: Fixed horizontal scrolling on tables when the keyboard is closed.
Added a persistent horizontal scrollbar to tables.
Added a convenient 'Copy table' button to copy table data directly.

title: 🏗️ NOVA_TABLE — New Table Engine
message: Complete rethink: Nova now outputs tables in a custom format, not raw markdown.
The app converts this to clean, perfectly structured tables every time.
No more broken rows, HTML garbage, or empty cells from icon images.

title: ✅ Smart Yes/No Table Decoder
message: Nova sometimes uses icon images for Yes/No — we now decode them to actual text.
Green checkmark icons → Yes. Red X icons → No.
Tables now show real data instead of empty cells.

title: 🔬 Table Cell-by-Cell Sanitizer
message: Fixed the root cause: unclosed HTML like
Every table cell is individually cleaned before rendering.
Tables can no longer be polluted by partial or garbage HTML from Nova.

title: 🔧 Table Renderer Deep Fix
message: Fixed 3 root-cause bugs in the table sanitizer that were silently skipping broken rows.
Tables are now never split across multiple chat bubbles.
Nova's table output is fully cleaned before rendering.

title: 🛡️ Table Sanitizer Shield
message: Added a triple-layer protection system to prevent AI from generating broken table content.
Nova's instructions now have nuclear-level bans on images, HTML, and URLs inside tables.
A backend sanitizer and a client-side sanitizer both clean output before it reaches you.

title: 🏆 Pro-Level Table Rendering
message: Tables are now rendered with a completely custom, built-from-scratch engine.
Nova now understands how to format tables correctly — clean columns, bold headers, proper scrolling.
Tables look and work just like ChatGPT. Swipe left or right to explore wide tables.

title: 📜 Horizontally Scrollable Tables
message: Tables now support horizontal scrolling!
If a table is too wide to fit on your screen, you can simply swipe left and right on the table to see the rest of the columns, just like in ChatGPT.

title: ✨ Better Table Formatting
message: AI chat bubbles now expand to 95% of the screen width to give tables more room.
Tables now automatically expand to fill 100% of the bubble's width, eliminating empty space.

title: 🐛 Fixed Table & Gray Box Formatting
message: Fixed a bug where bold text inside tables and gray boxes was still displaying raw asterisks.
The custom bold text renderer now applies everywhere!

title: 🐛 Fixed Bold Text Rendering
message: Fixed an issue where **bold** text with newlines inside them would render as raw asterisks.

title: 🐛 Fixed List Formatting Bug
message: Fixed an annoying UI issue where numbered lists and bullet points would shrink into a narrow, unreadable 1-character wide column.
Lists now use the full available width of the chat bubble perfectly!

title: ✨ I know when to stay on topic
message: Fixed a bug where Nova would bring up past topics (like tap water) when you asked about something completely different.
Nova's memory is now silent background knowledge — it only speaks when you ask.

title: ✨ Smart Mode in Offline/Degraded Mode
message: Fixed a bug where the backend running in Degraded Mode bypassed the new intelligence settings.
Nova will now maintain high temperature and anti-repetition rules even during server slowdowns.

title: ✨ I've learned something new
message: Fixed an issue where **bold** text and lists weren't formatting properly in chat bubbles.
I've received a major intelligence upgrade! My critical thinking and scientific reasoning are sharper.

title: ✨ I've learned something new
message: Gray boxes now support rich text formatting like **bold**, *italics*, and headers!

title: ✨ I've learned something new
message: Added beautifully styled gray boxes for stories, poems, and scripts.
Added a brand new 'Copy' button inside every code/text box!

title: ✨ I've learned something new
message: You can now long-press to select multiple messages and copy them.
You can now edit your past messages to correct typos.
Multi-message replies now show clean corner fraction indicators.

title: ✨ I've learned something new
message: I can now keep up with you even if you send multiple messages quickly.
Our conversations should feel much more natural now.

title: ✨ I've evolved a little more
message: I learned Dark and Light themes.
I became better at handling updates.
